title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Don't Breathe 2
subTitle: Norman, a visually challenged navy veteran, lives in quiet solace with his foster daughter, Phoenix. However, he is forced to tap into his darker instincts when Phoenix is abducted.

title: Little Women
subTitle: As the March sisters enter the threshold of womanhood, they go through many ups and downs in life and endeavour to make important decisions that can affect their future.

title: Lake Placid vs. Anaconda
subTitle: A genetically modified anaconda and a giant crocodile escape captivity and enter a nearby lake. When the two massive creatures fight, the sheriff tries to prevent the town from being destroyed.

title: Ghost Rider
subTitle: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

title: The Emoji Movie
subTitle: Gene is a smartphone emoji who can show a wide range of emotions instead of just one. When he makes a mistake that threatens his life, he sets out to become normal like his fellow emojis.

title: The Walk
subTitle: Philippe Petit, a French street performer, dreams of performing daring stunts. He attempts to walk between the Twin Towers of the World Trade Center in New York on a tightrope.
A spaceship crash lands on prehistoric Earth, leaving only two survivors. Soon, they must learn to fend for themselves amidst the hostile terrain and its vicious creatures.

title: 28 Days Later
subTitle: After a mysterious virus wreaks havoc in the United Kingdom, a team of survivors tries to cope with the aftermath of the disaster and find security.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
subTitle: Spider-Man seeks the help of Doctor Strange to forget his exposed secret identity as Peter Parker. However, Strange's spell goes horribly wrong, leading to unwanted guests entering their universe.

title: Bullet Train
subTitle: Ladybug, a professional assassin, is assigned to retrieve a briefcase from a bullet train. Soon, he finds himself battling many other killers who board the same train but with a different objective.

title: Godzilla
subTitle: The fallout of a military nuclear test causes an iguana to mutate into a giant monster. Now this monster lays waste to cannery ships and New York city in order to feed and protect its brood.

title: Hotel Transylvania 2
subTitle: Count Dracula is overjoyed to witness the birth of his grandson, Dennis. However, when Dennis shows no signs of being a vampire, Dracula tries to help him unlock his powers.

title: Drunken Master
subTitle: Wong, a mischievous young boy, learns a special form of martial arts from his alcoholic master in order to prevent an assassin from executing his goals.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: The Pope's Exorcist
subTitle: Father Gabriele Amorth, an exorcist, uncovers a hidden conspiracy as he investigates the horrifying possession of a young boy.

title: Charlie's Angels
subTitle: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: Alpha
subTitle: Keda, the young son of a tribe chief, is accidentally left behind and must survive in the wilderness. He then encounters an injured wolf abandoned by its pack and the two form a bond.

title: Anacondas: Trail of Blood
subTitle: When an experiment goes wrong, a genetically enhanced anaconda offspring is unleashed. Possessing the power to regenerate, it quickly creates panic and destruction.

title: When a Stranger Calls
subTitle: During a babysitting job, Jill, a young woman, is terrorised by a psychopathic killer's ominous calls. Years later, he returns to menace her once again.

title: You Don't Mess With the Zohan
subTitle: Zohan, an Israeli anti-terrorist commando, stages his own death when he gets tired of his job and goes to New York City to follow his dream of being a hairstylist.

title: The Retirement Plan
subTitle: When their involvement with the wrong people puts her and her family at risk, Ashley turns to her estranged father for help, who is living a retired life in the Cayman Islands.

title: Terminator Salvation
subTitle: Judgement Day has occurred and skynet has all but exterminated modern society. Now John Connor leads the resistance against skynet but is unsure of victory until he encounters Marcus Wright.

title: Don't Breathe
subTitle: Three delinquents break into the house of Norman, a Gulf War veteran who is visually impaired, to steal his money. However, they discover that Norman is not as helpless as he seems.

title: Anacondas: The Hunt for the Blood Orchid
subTitle: A team of researchers is in Borneo to find the blood orchid, a flower that could hold the secret to eternal life. However, the scientists run afoul of the jungle's deadly snakes.

title: Ghostbusters: Frozen Empire
subTitle: The Spengler family must join forces with the original Ghostbusters to stop an ancient evil force from refreezing the world, whilst protecting their iconic New York City firehouse headquarters.

title: Bad Boys for Life
subTitle: Old-school cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett team up with the Miami PD's newly-created elite team to take down the vicious leader of a drug cartel.

title: Never Back Down 2: The Beatdown
subTitle: Four fighters from different backgrounds come together to train under a former MMA star. Ultimately, they have to fight each other and also the traitor who hides among them.

title: Gran Turismo
subTitle: With the help of a mechanic having a tragic past, an avid player of racing video games attempts to become a professional car racer.

title: My Tiny Senpai
subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: Radiant
subTitle: Seth, an aspiring sorcerer, sets off on an adventurous journey to battle mysterious creatures called Nemesis, who can vapourise anything just by touching it.

title: The Missing
subTitle: When rancher and single mother of two Maggie Gilkeson (Cate Blanchett) sees her teenage daughter, Lily (Evan Rachel Wood), kidnapped by Apache rebels, she reluctantly accepts the help of her estranged father, Samuel (Tommy Lee Jones), in tracking down the kidnappers. Along the way, the two must learn to reconcile the past and work together if they are going to have any hope of getting Lily back before she is taken over the border and forced to become a prostitute.

title: The Adventures of Tintin
subTitle: Tintin's new model ship sparks an adventure of intrigue and theft. He uncovers a historical mystery involving treasure, rival groups and a quest for scrolls revealing a sunken ship's location.

title: Afraid
subTitle: Curtis and his family are asked to install an artificial intelligence program in their house in a bid to test it. However, they soon begin to experience disturbing occurrences.

title: Morbius
subTitle: Determined to cure the disease that has plagued him his entire life, Morbius conducts a drastic experiment, which bears unforeseen consequences.

title: Blade Runner 2049
subTitle: K, an officer with the Los Angeles Police Department, unearths a secret that could create chaos. He goes in search of a former Blade Runner who has been missing for over three decades.

title: Brightburn
subTitle: Tori and Kyle find a baby boy in a spaceship and adopt him as their own child, Brandon. However, after turning 12, Brandon learns that he has superpowers and begins to use them for sinister purposes.

title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
subTitle: The Angels track down rings containing the names of those in the FBI's witness protection programme. However, the witnesses begin to get murdered one by one.

title: Terminator 3: Rise of the Machines
subTitle: John Connor, a cybernetic warrior from the future, travels back in time to accomplish his mission of protecting a man and his future wife, Kate, from a robotic attack.

title: Ghost Rider
subTitle: Motorcycle stuntman Johnny Blaze gives up his soul to save his father and becomes the Ghost Rider to fight against Blackheart, the son of Mephistopheles, the devil himself.

title: Hancock
subTitle: A hard-living superhero who has fallen out of favor with the public enters into a questionable relationship with the wife of the public relations professional who's trying to repair his image.

title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
subTitle: Peter Parker, the beloved superhero Spider-Man, faces four destructive elemental monsters while on holiday in Europe. Soon, he receives help from Mysterio, a fellow hero with mysterious origins.

subTitle: As Shinozaki starts his new job, he struggles to learn until his tiny and adorable superior, Katase, takes him under her wing. As they grow closer, Shinozaki hopes for more than just her attention.
